# Find The Others

> A curated ecosystem for consciousness, transformation, and human connection. Connecting seekers, misfits, and free thinkers worldwide.

## About
Find The Others (FTO) is a public benefit corporation dedicated to connecting individuals with consciousness-expanding practices, spaces, and practitioners. We maintain a curated directory of aligned communities, retreat centers, and practitioners around the world.

## Offerings
- Directory: Searchable database of consciousness-aligned communities, retreat centers, and practitioners
- Events: Workshops, ceremonies, retreats, and gatherings worldwide
- Explore: Articles and knowledge on breathwork, meditation, psychedelics, and consciousness topics
- News: Stories, research, and reflections from the consciousness community
- Community: Discord-based community for real-time connection and support

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://findtheothers.world/): Community hub and featured listings
- [Directory](https://findtheothers.world/directory): Browse retreats, clinics, and practitioners
- [News](https://findtheothers.world/news): Latest articles and community updates
- [Events](https://findtheothers.world/events): Upcoming gatherings and retreats
- [Explore](https://findtheothers.world/explore): Knowledge base and guides
- [About](https://findtheothers.world/about): Our mission, vision, and core values
- [Team](https://findtheothers.world/about/team): Meet the team
- [Roadmap](https://findtheothers.world/about/roadmap): What we're building next

## Values
- Consciousness Expansion: Supporting safe and authentic exploration
- Grounded Practice: Emphasizing integration and practical application
- Authentic Connection: Fostering genuine relationships based on shared values
- Reverence: Respecting all beings and the planet
